reason: Both answers reach the same correct conclusion (fix CI/CD, not architecture), give nearly identical actionable fixes (merge queue/continuous deploy, faster CI, feature flags, automated rollback), and both correctly point to modular monolith/Packwerk as the next step before microservices. The only substantive difference is that Answer B explicitly cites both Shopify and GitHub as precedent, matching the "Shopify/GitHub-scale" point more completely, while Answer A cites only Shopify. Answer A's slightly more specific tool naming (Mergify) is a minor, non-decisive counterbalance. Overall the two are comparable in quality with no meaningful correctness gap and no padding advantage either way; B has a small edge on completeness of the precedent point.
